subcodes.first_line: O distinguished leaf! Thy letter was perused, and it brought joy and spiritual fragrance. Praise be to God, thy father is enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه بدیعه نامه تو ملاحظه گردید و سبب روح و ریحان شد الحمد لله پدر سرمست
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @being a source of light; guidance, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
